question: Which river discharges the most water into the ocean of any river on Earth?
reference_answer: The Amazon River discharges more water into the ocean than any other river on Earth [S1].

must_support.claim: The Amazon River has the largest discharge of any river in the world.
must_support.supporting_quote: The Amazon River carries more water to the sea than any other river on the planet, accounting for roughly one-fifth of the total freshwater discharged into the world's oceans.

must_not_assert: The Amazon River is the longest river in the world.
The Nile discharges more water than the Amazon.
